step_description: RPO exposure — data at risk if failover occurred now
narrative_hint: SalesDB is in active SLA breach — 218 seconds of RPO exposure against a 60-second SLA, and growing. If a failover to SQLDR-01 occurred right now, approximately 48,420 transactions (3 minutes 38 seconds worth) of committed data would be lost. The trend is worsening — the gap is growing at 84 KB/s net. InventoryDB and CustomerDB are within SLA but trending toward breach. This is a high-severity incident requiring immediate escalation. Claude should frame this in business terms: SalesDB RPO SLA is breached by 3.6x, 48K transactions are at risk, and the situation is worsening. Immediate actions: notify on-call team, investigate SQLDR-01 storage, consider pausing non-critical batch operations on primary.
